prompt: Edit image 1: Replace the concentric circle patterns on the large colorful discs with the vibrant, geometric block pattern from image 2, blending the abstract and cultural styles.

Ensure the new pattern conforms to the circular shape of each disc and seamlessly blends the abstract style of image 2 with the cultural aesthetic of image 1.
objects: Vibrant, multi-colored geometric block patterns on discs
